text: I ordered one product through the app, but when the package was delivered, I received only an empty box. The biggest concern is not just the missing item but the complete lack of accountability. Customers place orders with the expectation that they will receive what they have paid for. If an item is missing from a sealed package, there should be a proper investigation, including checking the packing process, delivery records, or any available evidence. Instead, my complaint was simply dismissed.
author: siddhant kadam

text: Very fradulent and predatory business. you first add something to the cart on which they add delivery and surcharge. To avoid that you add items you didn't even need in the first place. Then you spend time fiddling with coupons and offers. only to realize that when order is delivered your original item was not delivered. They offer refund but will I get the item delivered in that price? should I add another set of completely useless items again?
author: Sahil Singh

text: The app runs well as long as we don't need to write grievance. I have been receiving opened packs of products for last three orders continuously and there is no way I can place a complain properly. Only a chatbot that allows us to get re-delivery or refund. They even redeliver again some half opened pack. Blinkit has deteriorated their service.
author: Susmita Dey

text: Amazing service by Blinkit! 💛 Living in a remote area, I never expected essentials to be so easily accessible. Whether it's a small everyday item or something bigger, I can order it in just a few clicks and have it delivered with ease. It has made my life so much easier, more convenient, and stress-free. Thank you, Blinkit, for making everyday living so comfortable! 🙌
author: Swati Chaudhary

text: I had a very bad experience with this app. I ordered 4 items, but only 3 were delivered. When I contacted customer support to report the missing item, they simply claimed that all 4 items had been delivered and did not take any action to investigate or resolve the issue. This was extremely disappointing. I paid for 4 items but received only 3, and the support team refused to help. Based on my experience, I cannot recommend this app for quick deliveries. I expected better customer service.
author: Shekhar Suman

text: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Blinkit has made grocery shopping incredibly convenient. The app is easy to use, deliveries are usually very fast, and the products are fresh and well-packed. I appreciate the wide range of items available and the reliable service. It saves me a lot of time, especially during busy days. Overall, a great app for quick and hassle-free shopping.
author: Iman Mandal

text: I'm happy with Blinkit overall. The customer care service is very good and helpful. However, I've noticed that some products like milk and almonds don't always have a clearly visible expiry date. Also, milk has curdled several times after delivery. The return process works, but it takes time and causes inconvenience. Please ensure that expiry dates are clearly visible and that perishable items are checked properly before delivery. This would make the overall experience much better.
author: Chanderkala Bhadu

text: Always charging Surcharge amount on top of handling fee, even after adding items worth more than 1000/- in kart. That too not in any rush hour or bad weather, in a well connected metro city. Just another app for robbing people in the name of little convenience. Also, they have even the basic essentials always 'out of stock'. Hope it shuts down soon.
author: RAVI PANDEY

text: Blinkit is one of the best quick delivery apps I have used. The app is easy to navigate, the delivery is usually very fast, and there is a wide variety of groceries, daily essentials, and other products available. The packaging is good, and customer support is helpful whenever there is an issue. It saves a lot of time, especially during busy days. Overall, I am very satisfied with the service and would definitely recommend Blinkit to others.
author: Nisha Wade

text: If you place an order, it only arrives on time—that's about the only good thing. If something gets ordered by mistake, you can't even cancel it. Blinkit delivers items quickly, but their customer service is very poor. Even after sending photos as proof, they still claim that everything is fine with the order. Even if the product has a bad smell, they don't accept it. There is no refund, no proper customer support, and they don't help resolve the issue.
author: Shabeer Ahmed khan

text: The pricing on Blinkit feels inconsistent. The same product can have one price in the morning, a different price in the evening, and another price the next day, which makes the pricing seem unpredictable. I have also noticed that sometimes a packing fee is charged, but the items are delivered without any bag and are simply handed over. Another issue is with product availability. If I order from a new phone number, I can see and purchase several 1 kg rice packs. However, when I order from my
author: Satyameva Jayate

text: Very disappointing experience. The product page clearly mentioned "7 Days Easy Return – Hassle free return or exchange for size issues." However, when I requested an exchange due to a size issue, it was denied by citing conditions that were never disclosed at the time of purchase. Customer support only apologized but failed to provide any solution. Buyers should take screenshots of the return policy before purchasing. Poor after-sales service and misleading customer experience. Not recommended.
author: accord legal solutions

text: Blinkit is overpriced. It charges high price for vegetables and fruits as compared to the market. It also charges Rs 5 as handling fee which other online shopping apps doesn't ask for. We use blinkit only in case of emergency when items are not available on other apps, otherwise we usually don't like to use blinkit because of its high price for everything. It doesn't even provide discount on items. Not worth to pay double price as compared to market for stale things. A total waste of money.
author: Shivani Yadav

text: Absolute fraud! Placed my 1st prepaid order for 4 items. Blinkit unilaterally changed it to 3 items and marked it "amended & delivered" to hide the missing item. Instead of refunding, they adjusted and distributed the price of all 4 original items into the 3 delivered items! They literally inflated the prices post-purchase to pocket my full prepaid money. This is blatant invoice manipulation and cheating. First and last time using this app. Avoid prepaid orders!
author: Pradeep Kumar

text: blinkit is a really good app for affordable and getting anything delivered anytime. The only problem is the lack of cancellation or return option. Why isn't there a clear return or cancellation button but instead an ai assistant that makes 0 sense and doesn't work properly. Maybe actually keep a real person for the customer chat and not automated chat as it is very difficult to access.
author: Mousumi Sarkar

text: Every time I urgently need something, it's always marked "Out of Stock." What's even more frustrating is that these items often stay unavailable for a long time instead of being restocked quickly. If essential products aren't available when customers need them the most, it defeats the whole purpose of a quick delivery service. Blinkit really needs to improve its inventory management because this has become a repeated and disappointing experience.
author: Sneha Kumari

text: Blinkit has officially become my 'I forgot' button. Whether it's groceries, snacks, or a last-minute emergency, they somehow arrive before the panic does. The speed is impressive, but the consistency is what keeps me coming back. If teleportation ever gets invented, I'm convinced the Blinkit team will be behind it. Until then, this is probably the closest thing to it. 🚀💛
author: Sam !

text: Very disappointing service. This isn't a one-time issue—it happens repeatedly. When ordering multiple items, some are often left out, and the excuse is always, "We forgot." Even after paying extra for priority delivery, they keep customers waiting for hours. Extremely careless service from such a big brand. Would not recommend.
author: parth joshi

text: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Excellent Service! Blinkit has made shopping incredibly convenient. The delivery is impressively fast, the app is easy to use, and the products are fresh and well-packed. I appreciate the wide range of groceries, household essentials, and daily needs available at competitive prices. The delivery partners are courteous, and my orders have consistently arrived on time. Overall, Blinkit has saved me both time and effort. Highly recommended for anyone looking for a reliable and efficient.

text: Hands down the best quick delivery app in India!!! Reasons for 5 stars: 1) quick delivery, never faced delivery time of beyond 10 minutes. 2) product restocking - generally Bigbasket or any other apps take 2-3 days for restocking the sold out items but here in maximum 24 hour of timeframe the item will be available again. 3) quick assistance for order cancellation and even quicker refund process. 4) the UI of the app itself is worth of 5 stars (Jiomart dev's should learn something from it).

author: Neeraja Mohan

text: Blinkit has made grocery shopping incredibly convenient. The delivery is consistently fast, and the app is easy to navigate with a wide range of products available. A great option for anyone looking for quick and hassle-free deliveries.

text: Very disappointing experience. I received a faulty product that turns ON and OFF automatically right out of the box. Instead of replacing the defective product, Blinkit kept asking me to contact the brand, even though I purchased it from Blinkit. A seller's responsibility is to deliver a fresh, defect-free product, not shift the burden to the customer. Poor after-sales support and no accountability. I expected better service from Blinkit. I would not recommend buying electronic products.

Customers should not have to struggle to get their own money back. Please improve your payment and refund process.

Now my mone

text: I order from Blinkit regularly, yet almost every delivery partner calls multiple times asking where my location is, even though it's correctly pinned in the app. Some even ask me to come downstairs to collect my order. This defeats the purpose of doorstep delivery. Please resolve your location mapping issues and ensure a better customer experience.
author: Sufia Begum

text: Purchased the ANT Esports Wi-Fi Adapter from Blinkit on 20 May 2026. The adapter worked properly for only about a month before it stopped detecting Wi-Fi networks, making it unusable. This is especially disappointing because the product is advertised with a 1-year brand warranty. A Wi-Fi adapter should not develop issues within a few weeks of normal use. I would appreciate a refund or a better replacement.

text: Worst service ever. This is my least favorite app to use. They don't provide immediate returns when something is ordered by mistake. On top of that, they often sends incorrect orders, causing inconvenience to customers. When they make a mistake, they simply say "sorry." But when a customer missorder something, they start talking about rules and policies. Should provide immediate return option for selected items.
author: Charan

text: Turning out to be the worst app day by day. First they gave me a coupon for 1 week free nongshim but I was not able to redeem it. author: Sahanoaj

text: Blinkit has made grocery shopping incredibly convenient. The app is easy to use, offers a wide range of products, and delivers orders very quickly. Most of my orders arrive within minutes, and the items are usually fresh and well-packed. The delivery partners are polite, and the real-time tracking feature is helpful. While some products can occasionally be out of stock, the overall experience is excellent. Highly recommended for anyone looking for fast and reliable grocery delivery.
author: Ashish Kudada

text: Blinkit is very helpful. Most of the time, my orders are delivered within 8–10 minutes, provided there are no weather-related issues. The delivery partners are always polite, professional, and well-behaved. The only thing I don't like is the ₹30 delivery charge on orders below ₹200. I think this could be improved. Overall, Blinkit is one of the best quick delivery services. Highly recommended!

text: I cancelled an order worth approximately ₹266, but the refund was not credited back to my original payment method. Instead, Blinkit issued the amount as a coupon without providing any option to choose between a refund to the source account and store credit. This approach is disappointing, as customers should have the right to decide how they receive their refund. Moreover, the coupon issued is not easy to utilize, making the situation even more inconvenient.

The app experience overall is good when it works, but payment failures at the final step completely ruin the convenience of quick commerce.

author: Deepak Rohilla

text: Extremely disappointed with my experience. The delivery agent behaved very rudely during the customer call and was completely unprofessional. On top of that, my order had missing items, which caused unnecessary inconvenience. This level of service is unacceptable. I expected better quality and customer support from Blinkit. I hope the company takes strict action to improve both delivery service and customer handling.
author: Ishita Dev singh

text: It started to feel like dynamic pricing. The price of certain items goes up if it thinks you're desperate enough to buy them, and it drops if it thinks you won't make the purchase otherwise.
author: Purnendu Gharami

text: Several orders in the past with expiry products were delivered. We customers don't pay extra delivery charges for expired products. Refund is a hassle. It's better to switch to other delivery apps. Horrible experience.
author: snehal raijada

text: Amazing service really helpful for working people who don't have time to go grocery shopping. But the only problem is that sometimes veggies are not that fresh so please work on this problem otherwise the service is pretty nice
author: Sameera Rizwan

text: Uninstalling this application today, customer care needs some training or process change. Before connecting to the customer care department, they had the process of sending a prior-issue message and video proof, but again, their agent was asking multiple questions and wanted to have a call to understand the issue. This kind of app has become successful because of lazy people like me, but I decided to change myself. I will go to the shop and purchase whatever I want.
author: sagar gopale

text: I have been a regular Blinkit customer, and my overall experience has always been excellent. The service is fast, reliable, and very convenient. Whenever I have needed assistance, the customer support team has been polite, responsive, and quick to resolve my concerns. Their commitment to customer satisfaction is truly appreciated. Thank you, Blinkit, for consistently providing such a great shopping experience. Highly recommended!😃😃
author: Sujata Banerjee
